caption: A woman with short black hair and glasses stands against a solid dark gray background. She is wearing a light green, short-sleeved blouse with a patterned collar and a dark necklace. A small microphone is clipped to the neckline of her shirt. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a circular logo is accompanied by the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman speaks, with her facial expression shifting from a neutral look to one of active communication. She uses hand gestures to emphasize her points; initially, her hands are held close together in front of her chest, then they move outward and open up as she continues to talk. The setting and her attire remain constant, while the only changes are her mouth movements and the positioning of her hands as she gestures.
